name: drillable
description: Drillable — ground your coding agent: it audits its work against cited sources instead of guessing.

plugins.name: drillable
plugins.description: Install it and your agent grounds its work against the 100+ domain reference corpus — run /drill <task> to work in grounded mode, or bare /drill to audit an answer after the fact — and says "no record" instead of bluffing. Optionally point it at your project's docs too. (Dependency gating in CI is the separate Drillable Check.)
